description: Brands with above-fleet-average power kW among registered passenger cars. Use when user asks which brands are most powerful or above average.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" | EVAL kw_clean = CLAMP(KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStoersteEffekt, 1, 750) | STATS brand_avg_kw = AVG(kw_clean) BY brand = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword | INLINE STATS fleet_avg_kw = AVG(brand_avg_kw) | WHERE brand_avg_kw > fleet_avg_kw | SORT brand_avg_kw DESC | KEEP brand, brand_avg_kw, fleet_avg_kw | LIMIT 15
